zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan於1331年出生在義大利維圖維洛納維洛納時，她的父親Mastino II Della Scala23歲，母親Taddea da Carrara27歲。她於1350年9月27日與Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和17個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年6月18日在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾享年53歲，埋葬在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan于1331年出生在意大利維圖維洛納維洛納时，她的父亲Mastino II Della Scala23岁，母亲Taddea da Carrara27岁。她于1350年9月27日与Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和17个女儿的父母。她去世于1384年6月18日在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾享年53岁，埋葬在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾。

nameMeanings.name: Della
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Angelo, Giuseppe, Onofrio, Rocco, Orazio, Antonio, Carlo, Fedele, Lorenzo, Mauro.
Italian: from a pet form or diminutive formed with -ella of a personal name or nickname ending in -ra (such as the personal name Sara), with loss of the first syllable.
Possibly also an American shortened form of Greek Rellas, which is probably of Italian origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Rillo
meanings: Italian: possibly from a variant of the masculine form of Rella , or from a short form of the personal names Ferillo or Perillo .
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Rillo in Teruel province. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Scala
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Luigi, Sal, Antonio, Carmine, Corrado, Orazio, Tiziana, Aldo, Angelo, Carlo, Carmela, Concetta.

Italian: topographic name from scala ‘ladder, flight of steps; wharf’ for someone who lived by a flight of steps or on terraced land; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Scala in Salerno province, Scala Coeli in Cosenza, or the district so named in Torregrotta, in Messina province, Sicily. Compare Di Scala and La Scala .
Americanized form of Czech Skála, Polish and Jewish (from Poland) Skała, or Slovak and Rusyn Skala .

variants.name: Di Scala
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emidio, Luigi, Nicola, Paolo.
Italian: habitational name for someone from any of various places places named with scala ‘ladder, flight of steps; wharf’ (see Scala ).

variants.name: Scalese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Gennaro, Guido, Pasquale, Vincenzo.
Italian (southern): probably a habitational name for someone from Scala in Salerno province (see   Scala  ).

variants.name: Scalera
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Vito, Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Gilda, Lorenzo, Luciano, Pasquale.
Italian:
habitational name from a district so named in Filiano in Potenza province.

variants.name: La Scala
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Faust, Natale, Nicola, Silvio.
Italian (also Lascala): variant of Scala , with the addition of the definite article la.

variants.name: Skala
meanings: Czech (Skála); Slovak (also Skála); Polish and Jewish (from Poland) (Skała); Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland; in Poland spelled Skała): topographic name for someone who lived by a rock or crag, Czech skála, Slovak and Rusyn skala, Polish skała. As a Jewish surname this is often artificial. Compare Scala and Skalla .

variants.name: Scali
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Domenic, Antonio, Geraldo, Orlando, Pasquale, Rocco, Carmela, Cesare, Fortunato, Giuseppe, Mauro, Pasqualina, Piero, Rosario, Saverio.
Italian (southern):
habitational name from Scali in Piedimonte Etneo, Sicily, named with Greek skali(n) ‘step, terrace’ (itself derived from Latin scala ‘ladder’), or from some other similarly named place.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

nameMeanings.name: Regina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin vocabulary word meaning ‘queen’. It was occasionally used as a given name among the early Christians; a St Regina , probably of the 3rd century, was venerated as a virgin martyr at Autun from an early date. In modern use it is normally borne by Roman Catholics in allusion to the epithet Regina Coeli ‘Queen of Heaven’, a cult title of the Virgin Mary since the 8th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan was born in 1331, in Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italy, her father, Mastino II Della Scala, was 23 and her mother, Taddea da Carrara, was 27. She married Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy on 27 September 1350, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 17 daughters. She died on 18 June 1384, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, at the age of 53, and was buried in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan est née en 1331, à Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italie, son père, Mastino II Della Scala, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Taddea da Carrara, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy le 27 septembre 1350, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 17 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 juin 1384, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan 1331 in Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mastino II Della Scala 23 und ihre Mutter Taddea da Carrara 27. Sie hat am 27. September 1350 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 17 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Juni 1384 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien und wurde in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan è nata il nel 1331 nel Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italia, sua padre, Mastino II Della Scala, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Taddea da Carrara, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy il 27 settembre 1350, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 17 figlie. Morì il 18 giugno 1384, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milanが1331年にイタリアベンエトーバーオナバーオナで生まれた時，父Mastino II Della Scalaは23歳，母Taddea da Carraraは27歳であった。1350年9月27日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノでBarnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と17人の娘の親であった。彼女は1384年6月18日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノで53歳で死去し，イタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan(이)가 1331년 이탈리아 븐토 베로나 베로나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mastino II Della Scala(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Taddea da Carrara(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1350년 9월 27일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 6월 18일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan nasceu em 1331, em Verona, Verona, Veneto, Itália, seu pai, Mastino II Della Scala, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Taddea da Carrara, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy em 27 de setembro de 1350, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 17 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de junho de 1384, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan родилась в 1331 г. в местности вирона, вирона, винето, Италия, её отцу по имени Mastino II Della Scala было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Taddea da Carrara, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy 27 сентября 1350 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 17 дочерей. Она умерла 18 июня 1384 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия.

sm.from 1374 to August 1403: mai le 1374 e o'o I le Aukuso 1403

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan nació en 1331, en Verona, Verona, Veneto, Italia, su papá, Mastino II Della Scala, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Taddea da Carrara, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy el 27 de septiembre de 1350, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 17 hijas. Murió el 18 de junio de 1384, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia.
